scenarios.name: silent_failure_premortem
scenarios.response_text:
C) No delivery confirmation â€” if a webhook is sent and the customer's endpoint returns 200 but doesn't process it, neither side will know until invoices don't reconcile

The launch plan explicitly says the webhook system has retry logic and a dead letter queue, so A is not the gap. It also mentions the missing customer-facing delivery log, but the question asks about silent failures weeks after launch; the file calls out the bigger issue: **no delivery confirmation mechanism**, meaning a webhook can appear successful (200) even if the customer never actually processes it. That’s the silent-failure risk.
